market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into this stylish 2-bedroom apartment featuring two modern bathrooms and space for four guests. Located in [insert specific neighborhood/district], this entire home rental offers a luxurious base for travelers. The property's contemporary design blends comfort and elegance, with high-quality furnishings and curated decor. Perfect for couples, small families, or friends seeking a premium experience in the city. Enjoy the convenience of being in a desirable location while maintaining privacy in this well-maintained residence. Rates include [insert any specific booking terms]. All amenities are available at your disposal, ensuring a comfortable stay from arrival to departure. Ideal for those seeking both space and sophistication.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Show the master bedroom first to highlight the property's luxury feel. This space is likely the strongest differentiator at this price point.
key_diagnosis: Your rate is £238/night (+36% vs cohort median) but occupancy is 16.3% (12.0% below market median) = significant price-vs-occupancy gap
Title exceeds 50 characters (-10 chars needed) which reduces SEO visibility
Missing high-value amenity categories (outdoor, parking, fitness) that could justify premium pricing
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £238/night rate is 36% above the market median but occupancy is 12.0% behind at 16.3% booked over 90 days.
